basic_details.job_title: ICAR Project Research Scientist II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) has officially announced the Project Research Scientist-II Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Eligible candidates meeting the age criteria as per the funding agency guidelines and possessing a Post Graduate degree in the relevant discipline with three years of post-qualification experience or a PhD can apply for this walk-in recruitment by submitting their application before 01 July 2026. The walk-in interview will be held on 03 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: As per the guidelines of funding agency
age_limit.details: As per the guidelines of funding agency

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree, including integrated PG degree (in Food Technology/ Dairy Technology/ Dairy Chemistry/ Food Chemistry/ Food Science and Technology/ Food Science and Nutrition/Biochemistry; and allied disciplines), with three years post qualification experience or PhD in above mentioned disciplines.
qualification.details: Post Graduate degree, including integrated PG degree (in Food Technology/ Dairy Technology/ Dairy Chemistry/ Food Chemistry/ Food Science and Technology/ Food Science and Nutrition/Biochemistry; and allied disciplines), with three years post qualification experience or PhD in above mentioned disciplines.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 67000/- per month + 30% HRA (= Rs. 87100/- per month)
salary_details.details: Rs. 67000/- per month + 30% HRA (= Rs. 87100/- per month)

content_sections.heading: ICAR Project Research Scientist II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICAR Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICAR Project Research Scientist II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR Project Research Scientist II Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Post Graduate degree, including integrated PG degree (in Food Technology/ Dairy Technology/ Dairy Chemistry/ Food Chemistry/ Food Science and Technology/ Food Science and Nutrition/Biochemistry; and allied disciplines), with three years post qualification experience or PhD in above mentioned disciplines.

content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.text: As per the guidelines of funding agency

content_sections.text: Rs. 67000/- per month + 30% HRA (= Rs. 87100/- per month)

content_sections.heading: ICAR Project Research Scientist II Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Soft copy of application submission deadline

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR Project Research Scientist- II Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ICAR Project Research Scientist II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this ICAR recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Project Research Scientist- II. This is a contract-based position within the ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Research Scientist- II position. This is a direct walk-in interview opportunity.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Post Graduate degree, including an integrated PG degree, in specified disciplines like Food Technology, Dairy Technology, Biochemistry, etc., with three years of post-qualification experience, or a PhD in the mentioned fields.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 67000/- per month plus 30% HRA, totaling Rs. 87100/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a walk-in interview process. Eligible candidates need to report directly at the specified venue on the interview date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held on 03rd July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q7. What is the last date to submit a soft copy of the application?
faq.answer: The deadline to submit a soft copy of the application via email is 01st July 2026. Ensure your application is sent before this date.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Division of Food Science and Post Harvest Technology, Indian Agricultural Research Institute, Pusa Campus, New Delhi 110 012.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.
